name: Fine lines & early wrinkles
dek: The conversation that should be entirely about prevention is, on social media, almost entirely about reversal. Topicals can soften visible lines and noticeably improve texture; they cannot replace the thirty years of high-UVA-PF SPF you should have started yesterday.
oneliner: Retinoid-led prevention is the only conversation.

triggers.n: The single largest contributor. SPF prevents what topicals can only partly reverse.
Collagen synthesis declines ~1% per year after 25. Mostly genetic.
Sugar cross-linking with collagen. Diet contributes; topicals contribute less.
Free-radical load + microvascular damage. Quitting reverses some.

ingredients.name: Retinol 0.3–1.0%
ingredients.evidence: Replicated wrinkle improvement; slower onset than tretinoin

ingredients.name: Vitamin C 10–15%
ingredients.evidence: Cofactor for prolyl hydroxylase; modest visible firmness

ingredients.name: Peptides (Matrixyl 3000)
ingredients.evidence: Modest; works as a stack member, not solo

ingredients.name: Bakuchiol 1%
ingredients.evidence: Single 12-week RCT vs retinol 0.5%; useful for retinoid-intolerant
